# CreaClip

> CreaClip is an AI-powered SaaS tool that transforms long-form videos into short, viral clips for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts in under 4 minutes.

## What is CreaClip?

CreaClip is a web-based video clipping tool designed for content creators, podcasters, coaches, and social media managers. Unlike fully automated tools (OpusClip, Vizard, etc.), CreaClip uses a guided pre-selection approach: the user highlights their best moments, and the AI generates clips exclusively from those selections — resulting in 100% relevant clips instead of the usual 10% hit rate.

## Key Features

- **Guided Pre-selection**: Users highlight their best video moments (30 sec), then AI generates clips only in those areas (2 min).
- **Live Preview with Editing**: Review and edit clips in real-time before generating — no wasted credits.
- **1-Click Multi-Format Export**: Export to TikTok (9:16), Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts simultaneously.
- **Automatic Transcription**: AI-powered transcription (Whisper) for subtitle generation.
- **Customizable Subtitles**: Full control over font, size, color, outline, position, background. Save presets.
- **Browser-Based Video Processing**: FFmpeg WASM processes video directly in the browser — videos never leave the user's device for editing.
- **Premiere Pro-style Editor**: Timeline with trim handles, split, multi-segment support, crop controls.

## How It Works

1. **Upload** a long video (MP4, MOV, AVI, up to 500MB)
2. **Transcription** happens automatically (1-3 minutes)
3. **AI Suggests** the best moments to clip, or search by prompt
4. **Edit** in the built-in editor: trim, crop, add subtitles
5. **Export** in all formats with one click

## Pricing

- **Free**: 10 clips/month, all features, CreaClip watermark
- **Pro** (24€/month): Unlimited clips, no watermark, all subtitle styles, priority support
- **Business** (49€/month): Everything in Pro + team (5 members), white label, API access

## Technical Details

- Built with Next.js, TypeScript, Supabase, Tailwind CSS
- Video processing: FFmpeg WASM (client-side, privacy-first)
- Transcription: Whisper via Replicate
- AI suggestions: Claude API
- Payments: Stripe
- Available in French, English, and Spanish

## Target Users

- YouTube creators wanting to repurpose long videos
- Podcasters creating clips for social media promotion
- Business coaches sharing short training clips
- Social media managers handling multi-platform content

## Links

- Website: https://creaclip.com
- Sign up: https://creaclip.com/signup
